on

Team Nigeria’s Rosemary Chukwuma failed to make it to the final of the women’s 100m at the 2024 Olympic Games.

Chukwuma faltered in the semi-finals of the event, finishing in last place.

She started the race in a commanding fashion but failed to sustain the momentum.

In the men’s shot put final, Chukwuebuka Enekwechi finished fifth with a throw of 21.42m missing out on a medal.

USA’s Ryan Crouser won gold medal with a throw of 22.90m.

His compatriot Joe Kovacs won silver with a throw of 22.15m, while Jamaica’s Rajindra Campbell came in third with a throw of 22.15m.
